# Arjun - Open Source Community

Welcome to the Arjun community! This directory contains community resources and guidelines.

## Getting Started

- **New Contributor?** Start with [../CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- **Found a Bug?** Check [../CONTRIBUTING.md#reporting-bugs](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- **Have a Feature Idea?** Check [../CONTRIBUTING.md#suggesting-enhancements](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- **Want to Help?** See our [Roadmap](../README.md#-roadmap)

## Community Guidelines

- Read our [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- Check [Discussion Guidelines](#discussion-guidelines) below

## Discussion Guidelines

When participating in discussions:

1. **Be Respectful** - Treat everyone with kindness and respect
2. **Stay On Topic** - Keep discussions relevant to the project
3. **Search First** - Check if your question has been answered
4. **Provide Context** - Include relevant details and examples
5. **Use English** - Primary language is English

## Communication Channels

- **GitHub Issues** - Bug reports and feature requests
- **GitHub Discussions** - Questions, ideas, and general discussion
- **Pull Requests** - Code contributions

## Support

If you need help:
1. Check the [README](../README.md)
2. Search [GitHub Issues](../../issues)
3. Start a [Discussion](../../discussions)
4. Check [Troubleshooting](../README.md#-troubleshooting)

Thank you for being part of the Arjun community! 🎉
